name: adobe-mcp
description: Drive After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro and Character Animator from Claude — scripting bridges, cross-app handoffs, inline previews, and a self-learning gotcha knowledge base.
long_description: Bridges MCP tool calls into each Adobe app's scripting engine (ExtendScript via AppleScript; Premiere via a CEP panel). Includes cross-app workflow tools (shared asset registry, layered PSD/AI handoffs into After Effects), per-app script libraries, inline visual previews so the model can see its work, and a knowledge base that auto-surfaces known gotchas on matching errors and learns new ones at runtime. Requires the Adobe apps themselves; macOS only. First tool call per app triggers a macOS Automation permission prompt — click Allow.

workspace.title: Asset workspace
workspace.description: Where rendered assets, the asset registry and learned lessons are stored.
